public_pull.note: Modal from_registry('ghcr.io/rylinjames/reflex-vla:0.2.0') succeeded on fresh infrastructure, proving the image is publicly accessible without auth.

package_installable.note: fresh-install-verified gate (modal_fresh_install_test.py) validates the identical pip package that the Dockerfile installs (`.[serve,gpu]` from the same commit). All reflex runtime + exporter modules import cleanly.

notes: Full in-container smoke via `docker run <image> reflex --help` is blocked by Modal's from_registry behavior — the Dockerfile's ENTRYPOINT ['reflex'] intercepts Modal's Python-runner exec, making that test harness unusable for this specific image shape. For real customers (`docker run ghcr.io/rylinjames/reflex-vla:0.2.0` → runs `reflex serve /exports ...`) the ENTRYPOINT is the correct and expected behavior. A GitHub Actions docker-run smoke test is tracked as a v0.3 follow-up.
